Let's set you up.

Three quick choices and you're in. We'll personalise everything from here.

Meet your tutor.

Pick a teaching style, then choose who you'd like to learn with. You can switch anytime.

Calm and structured. Great if you want to build solid foundations at your own pace.
Priya
10 years teaching acoustic and classical guitar. Known for clear explanations and building lasting technique from the ground up.
ClassicalFolkFingerstyle
Marcus
Former session musician with 20 years of teaching. Meticulous and warm, with a deep background in blues and jazz theory.
BluesJazzTheory
Sofia
Music school graduate turned independent teacher. Brings infectious enthusiasm to every session and loves helping students hit their first breakthrough.
PopLatinSinger-songwriter
James
Gigging musician and online educator with a talent for making complex techniques feel fun and approachable. Specialises in rock and acoustic pop.
RockAcoustic popSongwriting
Jordan
Conservatoire-trained with a no-frills teaching philosophy. Focuses on precision, technique, and rapid skill acquisition without unnecessary hand-holding.
ClassicalMetalMusic theory
Daniel
Professional guitarist and educator. Cuts straight to what matters, identifies weaknesses fast, and gives clear actionable feedback every session.
JazzBluesImprovisation
